80 A2100_DSCHRG_STUS_CD A2100_DSCHRG_STUS_CD A2100 Discharge Status Code CHAR 2 The data in this column identifies the resident's discharge status. 01=Community (private home/apt.,board/care,assisted living, group home)
02=Another nursing home or swing bed
03=Acute hospital
04=Psychiatric hospital
05=Inpatient rehabilitation facility
06=ID/DD facility
07=Hospice
08=Deceased
09=Long Term Care Hospital
